def positive_helper_name_hides_mutation_or_io_side_effect():
    rule_id = "helper_name_hides_mutation_or_io_side_effect"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag helpers whose names sound pure but actually mutate state or perform I/O."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
